The GC743 DC321 ST00BP00 well was drilled & completed on January 30th 2014. The M-55 sand and the M54 sand were completed. Both intervals were individually Frac Packed sand control completions.  The completion allows for the isolation of the lower interval from the upper interval through the installed down hole flow control system. When the rig moved off the well, the upper interval DHFC sleeve (M55) was left open and lower interval (M54) DHFC sleeve was left closed.
Zone Change to the Ang B-6 Sand.
Change zone to the 6000 Upper A Sand and convert well from dual to single.
